content.text:
{And God said, `Let there be light,' and there was light.}{Genesis 1:3}
 {Computer graphics is the art of the possible.}{— Ivan Sutherland}
Every pixel on your screen is computed using linear algebra.
All standard transformations are matrix operations:

Animation = sequences of transformations. Interpolation between 
matrices creates smooth motion.

marginNotes.text:
O Lord, how manifold are your works! 
In wisdom have you made them all.
